picks.reason: Wheeler is one of the best starters in baseball — AGG xFIP 2.89/SIERA 2.90, Stf+ 109, and his L14 (3.38 xFIP over 13 IP, no small-sample flag) doesn't show meaningful degradation. Gusto is an AGG 4.47 xFIP arm with only 9 IP on the season and a [sm] flag on all data; his FIP is misleadingly good at 1.77 on 9 IP. PHI's Duran at closer (1.90 ERA, 38.5% K%) and Kerkering anchor a strong bullpen. MIA bullpen is shaky with Fairbanks at 6.63 ERA and Petersen/Bender both taxed Saturday. Market at -212 ML is heavy juice; the -1.5 RL at -105 opened +115 and has drifted sharply toward PHI covering, which aligns with the starter gap. I estimate PHI win prob ~62%, implied PHI -1.5 cover ~56.9%, estimated cover ~62% → gap ~5.1 pts.
picks.data_gap: Gusto small-sample flag limits confidence; confirmed lineup would sharpen the platoon edge calculation.
